race.comment: KILLIANA (8) looks well placed. She's a lightly raced filly who was only run down very late first up at Sale over 1013m, well backed there when beaten a nose. She's been kept fresh since then, should be fitter with Zahra on a huge positive. Expect she goes close. CALL TO GLORY (1) ran a good race first up at Caulfield in stronger company, beaten 1.5 lengths by a good horse in Bazaball Rewarded. He'll give a sight. ALONG THE RIVER (2) was in the market in the same race but struggled having won well over this route prior. He should get a nice trail and take beating. LAVANDULA (9) resumes. She won two on the bounce to start last campaign and has trialled very well leading in. Keep safe.
